intendedProofShape: Opening observations leave multiple layouts. The first proof wave finds a safe or object cell that changes the material scope for a second proof wave.
rejectIf: effective board removes a padded side
ray or region has one effective unknown after opening reveals
second wave only repeats the first wave's rule family
